transcript:
CALLER: Hi, main appointment cancel karwana chahta hoon. I'm not feeling well enough to come today actually, ironic as that sounds.
AGENT: Oh, please take care! Could you share your name and appointment details?
CALLER: Rohit Chandra. I had a 3 PM slot with Dr. Anjali Verma today.
AGENT: Got it. I see that appointment. I'll cancel it now. Once you're feeling better, would you like me to note a preferred time for rebooking?
CALLER: Maybe next week sometime, in the morning. But I'll call back, I don't know my schedule yet.
AGENT: Totally fine. The appointment is cancelled now. Please rest and do call us when you're ready to book again. Get well soon, Mr. Chandra!
CALLER: Thank you, take care.
